prompt: We just had an outage. The cache layer went down and took out half our requests. What do we do right now, and how do we figure out what went wrong?

assertions.description: Provides immediate action steps (Triage + Communicate phases)
assertions.check: Response covers severity assessment, role assignment, immediate communication template, and fastest mitigation paths (failover, bypass, etc.)

assertions.description: Addresses root cause analysis (Mitigate + Postmortem phases)
assertions.check: Response includes evidence collection steps, postmortem template structure (timeline, 5 Whys, action items, blameless tone)

assertions.description: Postmortem focuses on systems, not individuals
assertions.check: Response emphasizes blameless postmortem, systems/process improvement, not individual accountability
